details.test: Task 1: Find and copy SWIFT code for Bur Dubai main branch
Task 2: Save cheapest DIB branch for outgoing international transfer <= 20 AED
Task 3: Find late-opening corporate branch in Dubai Marina and copy routing code
Task 4: Validate IBAN and copy SWIFT of associated Deira branch
Task 5: Compare Deira USD transfer cut-off times and save earlier branch
Task 6: Add two Emirates NBD branches to comparison list and view currencies row
Task 7: Bookmark Dubai IBAN structure guide (<= 10 min) to reading list
Task 8: Submit correction report for branch code on Bur Dubai main branch
